MASTER CALENDAR JURY ASBESTOS
Off Calendar Mar-18-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-03-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 304

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Realign Defendant-Heir As Plaintiff
Off Calendar Jul-15-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 15, 2025, in Department 304, Line 2.

No appearances, not contested, The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiffs' Motion for Order to Realign Defendant Heir, Trevor Muckelvance, from the Status of Defendant to Plaintiff is GRANTED. No opposition filed. The Court has executed Plaintiffs' proposed order. Judge: Ethan P. Schulman. Clerk: Johnny Sengmany. Reporter: NOT REPORTED (304/EPS).

ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2025 Set For Trial On Apr-13-26 At 11:15 A.M. In Dept 206

DEPT 206 ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-17-2025 Continued To Jun-26-25 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 304

MOTION Motion And Notice Of Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-14-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, not contested, and the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff's Motion for Leave to File First Amended Complaint is GRANTED under C.C.P. 473(a)(1). No opposition filed. Plaintiff shall file and serve the First Amended Complaint forthwith on the newly added defendant Union Carbide Corporation, (previously sued as Doe 65 and 251), as well as on those defendants who have not yet appeared in the case. It is further ordered that existing Defendants (i) Amcord, Inc.; (ii) Omega Products Corp.; and (iii) A & A Building Material Co., have been added as parties to the First through Fourth Causes of Action of the proposed First Amended Complaint. It is further ordered that (i) Tierra Chesney; (ii) Traci Muckelvane; (iii) Todd Muckelvane; and (iv) Travis Muckelvance, are to be added as wrongful death plaintiffs in this action. Lastly, it is ordered that Trevor Muckelvane is added as a Defendant Heir in this action. The First Amended Complaint is deemed served on all other Defendants who have previously appeared in the action.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Not Reported, Bailiff: Not Present. (304/EPS)

ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2024 Continued To Apr-17-25 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 304
